summary: Added `if (!cwd) throw` guard to `dispatchToAgentAsync` and exported it with a `_spawnFn` parameter for testability. Fixed `gate.mjs` to accept an optional `--cwd` flag (falling back to `process.cwd()`) so the hardcoded `cwd: process.cwd()` is eliminated. Added negative tests for `dispatchToAgentAsync` with undefined cwd and a grep-audit test suite verifying no `cwd: process.cwd()` in agent dispatch or gate function bodies. All 558 tests pass.
